reviews.comment:
Baño en excelente estado, limpio, con insumos,
La chica, q atiende en los baños re buena onda, y el flaco q nos asistió con la máquina del agua q nos comió las monedas tmb. :)

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom is in excellent condition, clean, and has supplies.
The girl who works in the restrooms is really nice, and the guy who helped us with the water machine also ate our coins. :)
